title: What is 202 And where are these images from
display_title: What is 202 And where are these images from
wikitext:
[]: What is 2.02? And where are these images from?             Quote Post by asdfff » Sun Jul 11, 2010 8:34 pm Saw these images in the "things I noticed" post: NAveryW wrote: A couple of things in "Rebuild of Evangelion 2.02" that didn't make it into the final film. You've probably noticed them if you watched Rebuild, but here they are anyway: Those things on the Eighth Angel's wings that decide to pop up all of the sudden look much more like angels blowing trumpets. I'm guessing it was changed because it was too overt. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sun Jul 11, 2010 9:14 pm 2.02 is the making of featurette, yes. "Rebuild of Evangelion" refers to those bonus features but in the west the movies are also called such by fans. That image of Shinji was a joke image from the same.

[]:             Quote Post by asdfff » Sun Jul 11, 2010 10:00 pm Thanks for the info. Thank God it wasn't one MORE thing my wallet would have cried about.

Article: What is 202 And where are these images from
[]: What is 2.02? And where are these images from?             Quote Post by asdfff » Sun Jul 11, 2010 8:34 pm Saw these images in the "things I noticed" post: NAveryW wrote: A couple of things in "Rebuild of Evangelion 2.02" that didn't make it into the final film. You've probably noticed them if you watched Rebuild, but here they are anyway: Those things on the Eighth Angel's wings that decide to pop up all of the sudden look much more like angels blowing trumpets. I'm guessing it was changed because it was too overt. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sun Jul 11, 2010 9:14 pm 2.02 is the making of featurette, yes. "Rebuild of Evangelion" refers to those bonus features but in the west the movies are also called such by fans. That image of Shinji was a joke image from the same.

[]:             Quote Post by asdfff » Sun Jul 11, 2010 10:00 pm Thanks for the info. Thank God it wasn't one MORE thing my wallet would have cried about.
